label: Merge
description: 自适应合并多个 DataTree：slot[0] 首次连接的上游 access 决定行为档位 — item 级走 path 并集 + items 顺序串联（保留多分支结构），list/tree 级走 [i] 前置 pack。后续 slot 类型必须与 slot[0] 一致。支持动态扩展端口。
description-en: Adaptive merge: behavior is locked by the upstream access at slot[0]'s first connection. item-tier → union paths + concat items per path (preserves branch structure); list/tree-tier → prepend [i] pack. Subsequent slots must match slot[0]'s type. Supports dynamic ports.
icon: 多棵层级树从不同方向汇聚成一棵更大的树，扁平插画风格，主色2种。

inputs.name: item_0
inputs.description: 第 0 个输入；其所有 path 前置 [0] 段后并入结果
inputs.description-en: 0-th input; all its paths get [0] prepended and merged into the result.

inputs.name: item_1
inputs.description: 第 1 个输入；其所有 path 前置 [1] 段后并入结果
inputs.description-en: 1-st input; all its paths get [1] prepended and merged into the result.

outputs.name: tree
outputs.label: 树
outputs.description: 升一维后的 DataTree；输入 i 的 path P 在结果中变为 [i, ...P]
outputs.description-en: DataTree with one extra outer dimension; input i's path P becomes [i, ...P].
